query:
ALTER TABLE partners 
  ADD COLUMN stripeConnectAccountId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN stripeConnectStatus ENUM('not_connected','pending','active','restricted') DEFAULT 'not_connected' NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN bankAccountLast4 VARCHAR(4) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN payoutReadyAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN trialStatus ENUM('trial','active','expired','cancelled') DEFAULT 'trial' NOT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN trialStartedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN trialEndsAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN subscriptionPlan ENUM('local','regional','metro') NULL;
